Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.NewsFeedItem

Represents a news feed item.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
NewsFeedItemId

The unique id for for the news feed item, in scope of a site (itslearning customer).

 integer

None.
Text

Descriptive text for the news feed item

 string

None.
LocationTitle

The news feed item's project or coursetitle.

 string

None.
PublishedDate

Date time when the news feed item was published. Time zone is UTC.

 date

None.
PublishedBy

The person who published the news feed item.

 Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.PersonSimple

None.
Url

Url to the location in itslearning connected to the news feed item.

 string

None.
IconUrl

Url to the icon used by itslearning for the news feed item.

 string

None.
